sections.paragraph:
- Original: Πρόχορος

- Transliteration: Prochoros

- Phonetic: prokh'-or-os

- Definition: Prochorus = "leader of the chorus"

1. one of the seven deacons chosen by the church at Jerusalem

- Origin: from G4253 and G5525

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G4253 and G5525; before the dance; Prochorus a Christian: - Prochorus.
